{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120312EEE1A560E2686B990AAD"}"},"total":7974},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7277754052061528890","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书说实话，是我看过的所有书里面自认为最好的一本，情节的跌宕起伏，包括人物的塑造，以及对于那个里世界的描写，都算的上一等一，把所有的情绪，心理都描写的非常好，金手指的存在不会显得突兀，反而每一个描写都恰到好处，本书也是我看的最仔细的一本，400来章的书我看了3天，里面的每一个情节都有关联，至于结尾，也许是最好的结尾，留了大部分的空白，让人畅想，本书只有9.1的评分说实话在我心里是不足的，这本书是我看过所有书里面，唯一一本封神的书。","text_exts":[{"e":51,"s":48,"text":"里世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%87%8C%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740657926B990AAD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227277754052061528890%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227137961435212024872%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%87%8C%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694484769,"group_id":"7137961435212024872","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书看多啦，书架里有话题，推荐几本宝藏看看，什么类型都可","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7thhJE8Q51/rDTcoKVTba4NnKW4A3mBRudj7PGnGYTQ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/87412059a8004cfc8f0844e0d690d92d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617272&x-signature=oSIwqQCq2yCddJ2zHyAwNBQqAWU%3D","user_id":"2101856088623214","user_name":"碧婷笙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2101856088623214","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775278210,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7137961435212024872","book_info":{"abstract":"【智斗+不舔狗+爽文】【十章起飞】
普通上班族陆平的书柜忽而刷新出了第一封情报，小心翼翼的拆开,逐字逐句的阅读;他兴奋与紧张的发现，在这一封情报里，记录着关于高高在上的冰冷女总裁所有的秘密…
于是，陆平观看警匪片，模仿大佬的一言一行;对着镜子锻炼淡漠、嗜血的眼神;通过情报提前编纂好预设的文案..
他披上狰狞的狼皮，给高高在上的女总裁拨去了第一个电话，轻笑道:
“李小姐，我真是为你感到惋惜，你在我们的眼中就像是一只绝美的金丝雀…”
这是个普通上班族披上狼皮，混迹在狼群、老虎中刀尖起舞的故事！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1aacd52cea0c2efabc4b4f3852dd03f1","author":"大佬俞","author_id":"","book_id":"7137961435212024872","book_name":"我扮演教父，开局收一千万保护费","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7137961503570788902","read_count":"35599","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1099345"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"494","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/337ee8e3ea68d06b9db3728ec52bc5e6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779249792&x-signature=7Dka9mtWefbpFObS87N4mxDajR4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2859204398812814","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.214286e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120312EEE1A560E2686B990AAD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":34,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":52142,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":30675},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_
